feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,528Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 100

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: Bad Moon Rising
entry.summary:
Author: volchitsa70

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,228Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 1

Summary: The BAU are 99% sure that Peter Hale is the unsub they've been looking for. The only fly in the ointment is that his girlfriend(?) Lydia Martin, is an FBI agent and the newest member of the team.

entry.title: Deaf-netly Rejected
entry.summary:
Author: DaoOfGay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,053Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Look, he didn't expect to be kidnapped. Nor did he expected that, when the bag over his head was pulled off, that he would be face to face with three people- two men and a woman -fighting, arguing. Their lips moving rapidly, but he could get some things here and there like the words "Derek", "Rejected", "Apology", and a few things he... didn't quite had the context for. And then they turned to him as he spoke: "Not a very interactive kidnapping, not a very organized kidnapping crew, I've had better ones... I'd give it a 3 out of 10 stars." And then more people appeared. And they were talking, there were too many lips to form a coherent story, so he focused on a few to catch some things- until he felt a touch on his shoulder that made him flinch: "Fuck, whatever it is you guys want, I don't have it." And whoever was behind him was talking. He could feel it through the vibrations of the air into his back. "Can you at least speak in front of me? I can't see your lips from this position, and trying to talk to somebody who is deaf is kinda ableist you know?"

entry.title: The New Alpha
entry.summary:
Author: TMRCookie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,015Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 66

Summary: "Daddy?" Stiles hummed. "Will I have my own pack someday?" Stiles softly nodded. This child was definitely his child, asking questions. This is a story of Thomas from the Maze Runner being the son of Derek and Stiles from Teen Wolf.   The Maze never happened and some people from fandoms are not dead.

entry.title: Time After Time
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,286Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 417

Summary: Talia told Noah about werewolves and the supernatural when he was elected Sheriff. He warned her that was a mistake and she didn't understand why, until she realized that that meant ten year old Stiles knew about werewolves. God help them all.A soft and slow burn story about the five times the Stilinskis saved the Hales over the years, and the one time they were saved right back.

entry.title: All Hale Caffeine - Book 2
entry.summary:
Author: Molly_Is_A_Fangirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,813Chapters: 3/18Kudos: 56

Summary: Kate Argent is dead. Victoria Argent is locked up for life. But Gerard's out on the prowl, bloodthirsty for revenge and there is a Kanima running around town killing people, seemingly at random. With the help of the magic councils, can Chris and Allison trick Gerard into defeat? More importantly, will Chris be able to move past what he's done?While the pack races to figure out who the Kanima is and Stiles attempts to control his ever-growing magic, Gerard Argent looms closer and closer, threatening to unravel the pack and the happiness they have found. Coffee Shop AU Rewrite of Season 2. Please read Book 1 first, to understand what is going on.

entry.title: Last Anniversary
entry.summary:
Author: mythicalinker

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,852Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 46

Summary: The Aftermath of Happy Anniversary by IcyCryos Stiles gave Derek the one thing he didn’t deserve: a second chance. For a while, the shadows receded, and they finally began to build a life. But the past doesn’t stay buried—it hunts. When Luther resurfaces to shatter their peace, Stiles is forced to become the protector. Now, he must decide how much of his own soul he’s willing to sacrifice to save the man he loves. --- Or a fucking revenge fic Need to read that first so you will have an understanding of the story.

entry.title: a problem that doesn't want to be solved
entry.summary:
Author: wishingonalightningbolt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,899Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 189

Summary: Derek is an executive at Hale Publishing. Stiles is his assistant—his assistant who's 23 years younger than him. So Derek really shouldn't...notice him. The way that he does. -0- Stiles is attractive. Derek knows that. He’s not blind. Sometimes, not often, Derek finds himself—looking. Admiring. Stiles is tall and fit, broad shoulders that taper to a trim waist, an ass that Derek shouldn’t be checking out as often as he does, firm and high. Derek isn’t ignorant to his own fluid sexuality. He used to fuck men, back in the day, when he was twenty and single and easy. But then he was with Jennifer, and since the divorce it’s just seemed…less complicated. To date women. But he likes men—aesthetically. Sexually. He likes Stiles more than he should. And it’s weird not because he’s a man but because Derek has literally never had this problem before. He’s never been attracted to one of his assistants, ever. Then again, none of his assistants have been anything like Stiles.

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,289Chapters: 8/9Kudos: 13

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're not in the story yet, but I promise, they will be, and I will put it in the chapter notes when they're introduced. It will be worth it, so if you're here for that, I appreciate your patience!!!

entry.summary:
Author: diecide

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,661Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 57

entry.title: Yellow Paper Daisy
entry.summary:
Author: Babysterek

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,118Chapters: 24/25Kudos: 165

Summary: “Well,” Peter says at last, forcing a crooked smile into his voice, “at least this time he didn’t almost get us all killed.”Derek swallows. His throat is dry, the words scraping on the way out. “I was drunk.” They land and disappear without effect.Talia turns then, her gaze settling on him fully. It’s steady, unreadable, and it makes his shoulders tense despite himself. “You were careless,” she says. “You are a werewolf, and if you got drunk, you laced it with wolfsbane, you did it. Do you understand, In twenty-four years, every scandal has had the same root. You. At some point, it stops being bad luck and becomes character. And I am tired of pretending this is something that merely happens to you.”---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Derek just wanted a moment of quiet. Instead, he crosses a line with the last person he should trust.....old grudges, bad decisions and a mistake he keeps repeating. "He learned the shape of the poison once,from a woman who wore it like skin.Now hemlock blooms in his own hands,and he cannot tell where she ends and he begins. "

entry.title: Where Ashes Lie
entry.summary:
Author: TendreChaos

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 212,893Chapters: 37/40Kudos: 209

Summary: Stiles has always known he was different, that there was something inside him people were afraid of.In a society where the supernatural is hunted and contained, sorcerers are stripped of their names, their freedom, and their humanity. After months of captivity behind concrete walls, Stiles manages to escape and disappears into the woods, where he finds a rebel group willing to take him in. But trust is fragile and Stiles carries a secret, a power he barely understands and cannot share.Because if they knew the truth, if they knew what Stiles really was... They wouldn’t hate the cage that once held him.They’d build a stronger one.

entry.title: Feathers
entry.summary:
Author: MeepMeepWeepWeep

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,547Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 62

Summary: Stiles Stilinski died in the Argents basement. Or did he? Maybe he was turned into something and ran away, found new friends. But now he’s back. Winged stiles fic

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: Ripple Effect
entry.summary:
Author: whumprec24

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,980Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 61

Summary: Months after the Nogitsune, Stiles is acting strange. A betrayal sets off a horrifying series of events which fracture the pack and which they may never recover from. The question is, what is wrong with Stiles? Is it just after effects of the Nogitsune's possession or is it the return of something more sinister?......
